title: Inventory Ledger
description: Inventory system for managing products, tracking stock movements, monitoring inventory levels, and identifying low-stock items.

title: Authentication Login System
description: A full-stack authentication system that allows users to register, log in, and securely access their profile through protected routes.

title: SmartWheel
description: A full-stack reward wheel application where users answer riddles and spin a wheel to win prizes determined entirely by the backend.

title: Task Manager
description: A productivity app to manage and track daily tasks.

title: E-commerce Platform
description: A full-featured e-commerce website with payment integration.

title: Blog CMS
description: A content management system for blogging with rich text editing.
